notes: fetch_conversation.rs:78/103 -> agent-action FetchConversationResult::Error payloads surfaced as user/agent errors; translated, preserved {server_conversation_id} and {e}. file_glob.rs:339 and local_workflows.rs:206 -> PowerShell command templates (Get-ChildItem / Get-Content) executed as shell code, not UI -> protocol_key. read_mcp_resource.rs:115/124 -> agent error strings, translated (MCP kept). view_impl.rs:677 'Warp Docs' -> citation display name, translated to 'Warp 文档'. codebase_index_speedbump_banner.rs:20/29 -> banner UI, translated. model_menu_items.rs:41 'Profile default' -> menu label, Profile brand kept -> 'Profile 默认'. mcp/mod.rs:194 + templatable.rs:238 'MCP server' -> StringModel::model_type_name (cloud-object type discriminator) -> protocol_key. mcp/mod.rs:631 'Other Agents' -> MCPProvider display_name UI, Agents kept -> '其他 Agents'. appearance.rs:333 'Segoe UI' -> font identifier (load_system_font) -> protocol_key. generate_settings_schema.rs:233/238 -> generated JSON-schema title/description metadata artifact, not app UI -> protocol_key (preserves {channel}/{entry_count} integrity). code_review_header:500 fallback header -> translated. code_review/mod.rs:102/103 -> AUTOGEN_HEADERS content-matching patterns, not UI -> protocol_key. modal.rs:1743 tooltip translated (Warp AI kept). modal.rs:105 command-editor placeholder: kept echo command + {{your_name}} literal, translated the two instructional comments, preserved \n. menus.rs:63 'Clear secret' menu -> translated. omnibar.rs:449 'Convert to {}' a11y ({}=block type) -> '转换为 {}'; :455 'Remove link' a11y -> translated. feature_section.rs:412 '{x}/{y}' pure placeholder progress shell, no translatable words -> telemetry_payload (placeholder shell). search_item.rs:56 '[Tab {}] {}' -> title, translated 'Tab' -> '标签页'. warp_ai.rs:143 'Warp AI: {}' a11y -> full-width colon. warp_ai.rs:245 user_facing_error -> translated. alias_expansion.rs/scroll.rs/undo_close settings descriptions -> translated. billing v2: 'Auto-reload'->自动充值, '{credits} credits / {dollars}'->'{credits} 积分 / {dollars}', 'selected credit amount' fallback (interpolated into tooltip) -> translated. search_terms (mcp_servers_page:573, warp_drive_page:122/205) -> bilingual append, English keywords verbatim + Chinese, no punctuation. cli_agent.rs:213 'Mistral Vibe' + :214 'CLI Agent' -> agent display-name identifiers (enum siblings are product names) -> protocol_key. cli_agent.rs:410 build_review_prompt -> LLM agent prompt payload with backtick git commands, not user UI -> telemetry_payload. inline_menu view:889, terminal_size_element:39, tmux/commands:36, local_workflows:110, selection_model:109/258, fonts:283/404, selectable_area:189/207 -> .expect()/panic literals -> panic_message. links.rs:9/10 'Cmd +'/'Ctrl +' -> keyboard-modifier hint tokens kept verbatim -> protocol_key. event_loop.rs:324 'PTY reader' -> thread name (debug) -> telemetry_payload. local_workflows:218 'Tail prompt chip log' -> dogfood-only debug workflow name -> telemetry_payload. sharer_grant_body.rs:86 'Make Editor' button -> 设为编辑者; :114/:115 split sentence translated as two stacked fragments. onboarding inactivity modal:151 countdown ({}/{:02} preserved), :207 'Continue sharing', :234 'Are you still there?' -> translated. tab_config_step:59/68 onboarding title+description translated. computer_use lib.rs:145/152/159 -> Region::validate() Err(String) diagnostic messages w/ coordinate placeholders, internal validation not UI -> telemetry_payload. selectable_area 'Mutex is not poisoned.'/'Should not be poisoned.' -> panic. settings_value_derive:238/247 -> proc-macro compile_error diagnostics (build-time, developer) -> telemetry_payload. examples/ demo binaries (onboarding/examples/callout 'Onboarding Example'+natural-language demo text, warpui/examples/autotracking 'Toggle Dark Mode'/'Save Value') -> test_fixture (never shipped).
